final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce promotional poster for 绿联私有云 brand 618 anniversary sale campaign.

Style/medium: needs a 618 大促电商 festive-campaign aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a bold hero-layout direction — exact framing and hierarchy are yours
Subject: must include 绿联私有云 as the brand focal subject with 618周年庆 as the campaign theme
Scene/backdrop: needs a celebratory campaign backdrop — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a high-energy festive atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant 大促 direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "绿联私有云" (brand name), "618" (large, primary), "周年庆" (secondary)
Constraints: 
Avoid:
